message:
chore(beads): sync close metadata on 1 frankenterm bead after concurrent landing

Routine single-line beads metadata reconciliation. One already-
closed frankenterm bead record gets its close_reason / closed_at
fields updated to reflect a landing commit that went in
concurrently with this session's work. No new issues filed; no
issue bodies changed; line count unchanged (1 line modified, 0
insertions, 0 deletions).
